purpose: Empty-state illustration used inside IllustratedMessage for empty planning-calendar or scheduling views where no people/attendees have been added yet.
whenToUse: Team scheduling view before members are assigned
whenNotToUse: For general empty calendar — use EmptyPlanningCalendar
For empty user directory — use appropriate empty-state variant
doRules: Include description explaining why users are needed
Use appropriate size for the container
dontRules: Do not use without a call-to-action
Do not use for permission-denied states
Do not shrink below legible size
Do not use in single-user contexts

layoutGuidance.placement: Inside IllustratedMessage in empty scheduling region

contentGuidance.contentRules: Title names the state; description invites action
examples: Title: 'No attendees yet' · Description: 'Add people to see their availability' · Button: 'Add attendees'

requirements: Focus moves to CTA on show
